pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to support Jakarta EE 10/Tomcat 10.
Replace javax.servlet:jstl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api for Jakarta EE compatibility.
Replace taglibs-standard-impl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl implementation for Jakarta EE compatibility.
Remove javax.annotation-api as it is no longer needed or replaced by Jakarta equivalents.
Remove gson dependency as it is no longer used in the project.
Update log4j-core to a newer version for security and feature updates.
Update maven-war-plugin to a newer version compatible with the build environment.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add DBeaver IDE configuration directory to gitignore to prevent committing local database connection settings.

src/main/webapp/css/simple.css.general_idea: Added a comment block identifying the project context and source repository.
src/main/webapp/css/simple.css.human_impl: Added multi-line comment with project title and GitHub URL.

src/main/webapp/css/simple.css.general_idea: Removed the explicit UTF-8 charset declaration from the CSS file.
Changed the body background color from gray to a light cream shade.
Added a new CSS rule to center-align h1 elements.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Added a base href tag to resolve relative URLs correctly in the new deployment context.
Renamed existing links from 'First' to 'A simple' for better clarity.
Added navigation links for new Jakarta EE features like EL, JSTL, and web.xml configuration.

src/main/webapp/s02/timer.jsp.general_idea: Add a JSP comment block identifying the file as part of a Jakarta Enterprise Edition tutorial.
src/main/webapp/s02/timer.jsp.human_impl: <%-- Introduction to Jakarta Enterprise Edition - JSP ... --%>

src/main/webapp/s02/timer.jsp.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'type' attribute from the stylesheet link element.
Replace the inline back link with a dedicated navigation element.
Update the text of HTML and JSP comments to be more descriptive.
